violations.text: The following equipment was observed in poor repair/in need of adjustment: - The gasket to the server reach-in cooler was observed to be torn. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. PER the PIC, more time is needed for acquiring new gasket and installation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The grout lines in various areas of the kitchen area were observed to be in need of repair (worn/chipping). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

At the time of inspection, the temperature and pressure measuring devices to the dish machine were observed to be in need of adjustment/calibration. At the time of inspection, the high temp. dish machine was observed to be properly sanitizing per inspector testing devices. The temperature during the rinse cycle per the machine indicator was observed at 130-140 degrees Fahrenheit, while the pressure gauge was observed at 30 psi (not 15-25 psi as indicated). High temp. dish machine water pressure and water TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES shall be maintained in good repair and be accurate within the intended range of use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The Grill side Low Boy Cooler door hinges were observed in need of repair/adjustment. Doors observed to be staying slightly ajar and not held shut. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The grout lines in various areas of the kitchen area were observed to be in need of repair (worn/chipping). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor under and behind equipment in the kitchen and bar areas were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The hinges of the prep units at the cookline near the fryolator inhibiting doors from sealing properly. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Hinges ordered at the time of inspection. Per PIC, items are on order for repairs/replacements. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Poultry was cooked to 138 degrees Fahrenheit. Poultry must be cooked to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Food was reheated in the microwave to 180 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Various items in the cookline prep unit near the fryolator was observed held between 47-56 degrees Fahrenheit. The unit was observed maintaining an ambient of 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter observed on the counter held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit and moved to refrigeration. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were in the unit under 2 hours at the time of inspection and moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Maintenance service preformed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Sink and surface cleaner sanitizer solution was in excess of 700 DDBSA*/1875 Lactic Acid parts per million (ppm). A sink and surface sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC informed to contact distributer to recalibrate sanitizer concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Boxes of food were observed on trash cans in the kitchen during food preparation. FOOD shall be protected from contamination that may result from a factor or source not specified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Spatulas were stored on an unclean surface (top of the 3-bay sink shelf) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Item was moved to ware-washing area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The cookline prep unit near the fryolator observed maintaining an ambient of 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Maintenance service preformed at the time of inspection to repair prep unit. Ambient temperature of prep unit observed at 41 degrees Fahrenheit after service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The hinges of the prep units at the cookline near the fryolator inhibiting doors from sealing properly. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Hinges ordered at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
